title: WATCH:  Passengers evacuate by slides after engine fire on United flight at LAX
fullText: Passengers evacuate by slides after engine fire on United flight at LAXPassengers aboard a Boeing 787 Dreamliner were forced to evacuate by slides after the United Airlines flight landed at Los Angeles International Airport with its left engine in flames.March 2, 2026
summary: Passengers aboard a Boeing 787 Dreamliner were forced to evacuate by slides after the United Airlines flight landed at Los Angeles International Airport with its left engine in flames.
